heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the shops, restaurants, trades, and manufacturers of Forest City and the foothills. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Forest City and Rutherford County's foothills.
localP1: Forest City is a mill town with deep roots in Rutherford County's working past. Named in 1887 after Forest Davis, a local lumber merchant, the town grew into a textile center when the Florence Mill opened around 1899, drawing workers to Main Street. The historic downtown, with its West Main Street Historic District of 79 buildings, tells that story still. Today, the town's revival is real: the Main Street Program, awarded in 2003, has brought galleries, specialty shops, and restaurants back to those same brick storefronts.
localP2: We build for the people who keep this corner of the foothills going: the shop owner and restaurateur on Main Street, the trades and contractors moving the county forward, the services that support both sides of the county line toward Shelby and beyond. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Forest City, Rutherfordton, Shelby, Boiling Springs & the foothills

hereCard: Shops, restaurants, and trades in a mill town rebuilt on Main Street. Sites that bring customers through the door.

neighborCards.name: Rutherfordton
neighborCards.desc: The Rutherford County seat with a thriving downtown, arts center, and diverse dining and retail drawing locals and visitors alike.

neighborCards.name: Shelby
neighborCards.desc: Uptown Shelby's tree-lined square buzzes with independent retailers, craft markets, farm-to-table dining, and strong street-level growth.

neighborCards.name: Boiling Springs
neighborCards.desc: Home to Gardner-Webb University and named for natural springs, a growing community with roots stretching back to 1843.

faqOutsideAnswer: Yes. We serve Rutherford County, Forest City, Rutherfordton, Shelby, Boiling Springs, and throughout North Carolina, all done remotely with recorded walkthroughs.
